body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
For the last few months, the coupled benchmark tests have been faster than the standalone atmos-only runs (!). This is because they were running at a lower resolution, despite using the config files from the atmos-only runs as `atmos_config_file` in their configs. The intention here is that we would specify a resolution in the atmos-only config files and use that resolution for both the atmos-only and coupled runs.

However, the atmosphere configuration file was only parsed when creating the atmosphere model's configuration dictionary (not before, when parsing the coupled model's config dict). Now, we parse the coupled config file and atmos config file at the same time to more closely unify the two config dicts being used in the simulation.

## Config priority
Previous order of priority (from least to most):
- coupler defaults
- coupler config file
- (for atmosphere model only) atmosphere defaults
- (for atmosphere model only) atmosphere config file

Now, (almost) the same configuration dictionary is used for both the coupled system and atmosphere model, using the following order of priority from least to most:
- atmosphere defaults
- coupler defaults
- atmosphere config file (if provided)
- coupler config file

This means that we can specify e.g. `h_elem` in the atmosphere configuration file `atmos_config_file` used in the coupler configuration file, and it will be used for the entire coupled system.

## `override_default_config` -> `merge`
Note that previously we used the function `ClimaAtmos.override_default_config` to combine the atmos default and provided configs. This doesn't allow us to combine configs in our preferred order, so here we switch to call `merge` directly instead. This means we lose some type checking that's done in `override_default_config`, but that hasn't been done anyway when merging the coupler and atmos configs, so I think it's okay

## Content
- [x] move atmos config file parsing out of climaatmos.jl and into arg_parsing.jl
- [x] confirm that configurations match those before this PR (though they contain extra keys now from atmos config)

## Additional minor changes (could be moved to separate PRs if preferred)
- [x] remove `date0` from prescribed ocean albedo calculation - this is a default from Insolation.jl set [here](https://github.com/CliMA/Insolation.jl/blob/3a000b51002bf26774e0e1fffbb7a477153d8650/src/ZenithAngleCalc.jl#L166)
- [x] remove `dz_top` option from config files (has been unused since ClimaAtmos v0.30.1)
- [x] re-enable Float time (non-ITime) compatibility, and use Float time for one simulation
- [x] construct `AtmosConfig` object in climaatmos.jl instead of in driver
title: Fix config file overwriting
